title: AutoFeedShulker
description: Automatically feed players using a special shulker.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AutoFeedShulker plugin introduces a unique auto-feeding system through a special shulker box. When a player receives this custom shulker (via the /giveshulker command), it comes pre-configured with a distinct lore indicating its functionality: "Special Shulker for auto-feeding." [More detailed description here.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/24)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
